name: HOEGH LNG PARTNERS UTS
summary: Höegh LNG Partners LP owns and operates floating storage and regasification units (FSRUs), providing infrastructure for liquefied natural gas (LNG) import terminals. Headquartered in Hamilton, Bermuda, it offers long-term charters to energy companies. TICKER: Höegh LNG Partners LP owns and operates floating storage and regasification units (FSRUs), providing infrastructure for LNG import terminals and offering long-term charters.
